subcodes.first_line: We have hearkened unto thy call, and have answered thee with verses whereby the hearts of the Concourse on High and the dwellers of Paradise have been enraptured [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انا سمعنا ندائک اجبناک بایات انجذبت بها افئده الملا الاعلی و اصحاب الجنه
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for nearness to God, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
